exploration_notes: Explored the TSDB compaction implementation across 4 core files: tsdb/compact.go (LeveledCompactor with Plan/Compact/write/PopulateBlock), tsdb/db.go (DB.run loop, Compact trigger, compactHead, compactBlocks, reloadBlocks, metrics), tsdb/head.go (compactable check, truncateMemory, truncateWAL, head metrics), and tsdb/block.go (BlockMeta, BlockMetaCompaction, setCompactionFailed). All metric names in the runbook were verified against actual prometheus.NewCounter/Gauge/Histogram registrations in t
